-  kCTFontVendorURLNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontVendorURLNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontVendorURLNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontvendorurlnamekey#Discussion)

The name specifier for the vendor URL name.
